title: stelis macra
intro: Stelis macra, a species of orchid, is a plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and promoting wound healing. The plant's roots and rhizomes are rich in bioactive compounds, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it a valuable resource for various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, preventing infections, and protecting against oxidative stress. In traditional herbal preparations, Stelis macra is often combined with other medicinal plants to create teas, infusions, and topical applications that are used to treat a range of health conditions.
